metadata.environment: The Verse - Multiversal Nexus to The Void

characters.name: Micah the Unbreakable
King Cyrus the Dragon King
Aeron the Brave
Anastasia the Dreamer
Delilah the Desolate (Corrupted Ingris)

scenarios.description: The Catalyst: King Cyrus invades the rain-slicked, neon heart of LINC, destabilizing the Onalym Nexus and scattering the dimensions.

dialogue.speaker: King Cyrus
dialogue.text: You are a technological aberration, an error in my new order.

scenarios.description: The Void Beckons: Omega.one crash-lands in the 'Place Between Worlds'. The player must use VR climbing and holographic maps to find Shard Memories and repair the Stability Index.
Blood and Ash: Aerial VR combat against Kane, the Lava Demon. Players must utilize thermal updrafts and stay within Lyra's Solar Barrier.

dialogue.speaker: Lyra the Sun Stone
dialogue.text: Strength lies in the synergy of light, Aeron, not the rigidity of iron!

scenarios.description: The Siege of the Soul: Dynamic Multi-Character control at Concord's spires. Zaia and Anastasia collaborate to purge the Void from Delilah the Desolate.
Confronting Era: 10-player cooperative raid at the Onalym Core to execute the TSIDKENU strike and synthesize GAMMA.PRIME.

dialogue.speaker: Omega.one
dialogue.text: Alliance synchronization at 100%. Initiating Split Peel...
